# Treasury Agent

Autonomous cross-border treasury payment system built on XRPL for SwissHacks 2026.

## What it does

- Small, low-risk payments settle autonomously on XRPL in seconds via the AI orchestrator
- Large or compliance-flagged payments are locked in on-chain escrow and require physical Firefly hardware approval before release
- Every payment generates a full audit trail (intent, compliance score, policy decision, tx hash) stored in Postgres

## Architecture

- [Dashboard](https://web-production-4a5b2.up.railway.app/) — React/Vite SPA for initiating and monitoring payments
- [API](https://api-production-4a5b2.up.railway.app/) — Python FastAPI backend: orchestrator, XRPL, policy engine, compliance, audit
- Firefly bridge runs locally only; the AI never signs transactions

## Key principle

The LLM orchestrates and narrates. It never decides policy or signs transactions. Policy and signing are enforced by deterministic code only.
